synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3361 Important: Oracle Linux 10 firefox security update
description:
[140.8.0-2.0.1]
- Fix firefox-oracle-default-prefs.js for new nss [Orabug: 37079773]
- Add firefox-oracle-default-prefs.js and remove the corresponding Red Hat file

[140.8.0-2]
- Update to 140.8.0 ESR
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3361

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3361.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
firefox-140.8.0-2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
firefox-140.8.0-2.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/firefox-140.8.0-2.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm
